protocol_rows.detail: Expand from canonical seeds to broader-hit sessions only: 24 hit sessions, not 612 all sessions.
Only reversal_watch and severe_override_positive may enter broader phase-2 simulation.
mild_override_watch stays governance-only and may only feed do-not-readd logic.
Keep minute-close trigger, next-bar-open fill, and the same frozen EOD cost model with no local modifications.
double_run_exact_match = True must remain true before and after widening.
Broader-hit widening remains inside phase 2 and does not authorize phase-3 replay binding.

interpretation: V1.34J turns the seed supervision review into an explicit widening protocol.
The protocol does not open replay. It only says that, if phase 2 continues, the next lawful expansion is to broader-hit sessions under the same clock, cost, and governance constraints.
